title: trisetum bertolonii
intro: Trisetum bertolonii, also known as Bertoloni's hair grass or Bertoloni's oat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Trisetum bertolonii is typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
